name: cordovabuilder-admin-server-mcp
description: MCP server that downloads Cordova environment installers (Windows).

scripts.build:test: tsc test-client.ts --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir dist
scripts.build:api: tsc example-api-server.ts --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --outDir dist
scripts.inspect:zh: cross-env LOG_LEVEL=debug DANGEROUSLY_OMIT_AUTH=true npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node dist/index.js
scripts.inspect:verbose: cross-env LOG_LEVEL=debug DANGEROUSLY_OMIT_AUTH=true npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node dist/index.js
